evals.prompt: My new paper just got indexed on Google Scholar and my citation count went up. Can you sync my portfolio's research page with my Scholar profile?
evals.expected_output: data/publications.json updated with fresh metrics, last_updated set to today, new publication appended with correct type; index.html teaser numbers kept consistent; research.html verified locally.

evals.prompt: I just passed the HashiCorp Terraform Associate certification (2026). Add it to my portfolio.
evals.expected_output: A new education-card added at the top of the certifications grid in index.html using the existing markup pattern and an appropriate devicon/FontAwesome icon, without breaking layout.

evals.prompt: Add a projects page to my portfolio site with a couple of my GitHub projects.
evals.expected_output: A new projects.html cloned from research.html's shell (head, navbar, footer, cookie assets), styled with existing design tokens, nav links updated across pages, and script.js NOT included on the subpage.
